commandsRun: rm -rf .turbo && DATABASE_URL=... AWS_ENDPOINT_URL=... pnpm test (x2 cold)
result.notes: Invariants proven real PG: (a) emails_sent rollup DERIVES from messages_log SET-to-truth (ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE SET value=EXCLUDED.value), idempotent, heals drifted counter (999->7), workspace-scoped; (b) cost view sums penny-exact to direct_total+fixed_total, same active set (status='active') as denominator AND iterated rows, $24.95 IP only on upgraded; (c) advisor all-criteria-AND recommends only sustained-100k+cadence+healthy, rejects spikes, persists ip_recommendation WITHOUT changing ip_mode; (d) upgrade shared->warming->dedicated via jsonb merge preserving DKIM/config_set, SES-provision-first (failure leaves shared). Added provisionDedicatedIp(poolName) to SesEmailClient (CreateDedicatedIpPool) -> updated 5 concrete fakes for typecheck. billingUsage returns computed cost view + ip_recommendation/ip_mode badge, preserves existing usage array (web billing + role-visibility e2e unaffected, marketer still 403). Fixed pool $40 (METERING_FIXED_TOTAL env). No migration (usage_counters exists; ip fields in sending_identity jsonb). Did NOT run web Playwright (billing UI unmodified, only additive API; marketer-403 covered by router-role-enforcement).
result.testSummary: Cold full pnpm test TWICE: both green, 40/40 turbo tasks, no regression phases 2-12. Metering 51 tests (9 files) incl real-PG integration (rollup-reconcile, cost-view-sums-to-total, ip-advisor-inputs, ip-mode-warmup-transitions). @cdp/email ses-provision unit. local-api 27 incl new billing-cost-view + unchanged router-role-enforcement. web 33.
